summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Channel Manager, Object Storage, and PMS-CRM Sync features. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed 3 bugs: MongoDB ObjectId serialization in channel connections, HTTPException handling in storage upload, and PMS-CRM sync field name mismatch.
passed_tests: Channel Manager: GET /api/hotels/{id}/channel/connections - list OTA connections (200)
Channel Manager: POST /api/hotels/{id}/channel/connections - create Booking.com connection (200)
Channel Manager: POST /api/hotels/{id}/channel/connections - create Expedia connection (200)
Channel Manager: POST /api/hotels/{id}/channel/connections - create Airbnb connection (200)
Channel Manager: POST /channel/connections/{id}/test - test connection (200)
Channel Manager: GET /api/hotels/{id}/channel/inventory - get inventory grid (200)
Channel Manager: Inventory endpoint requires date parameters (422)
Channel Manager: GET /api/hotels/{id}/channel/rates - get rates (200)
Channel Manager: POST /api/hotels/{id}/channel/reservations/sync - sync OTA reservations (200)
Channel Manager: GET /api/hotels/{id}/channel/reservations - list OTA reservations (200)
Channel Manager: GET /api/hotels/{id}/channel/rate-shopper - competitor rate analysis (200)
Channel Manager: Connection endpoints require authentication (401)
Object Storage: POST /api/storage/upload - upload PDF employee document (200)
Object Storage: POST /api/storage/upload - upload JPG employee photo (200)
Object Storage: POST /api/storage/upload - upload PNG employee document (200)
Object Storage: Invalid file type correctly rejected (400)
Object Storage: Upload requires authentication (401)
Object Storage: GET /api/storage/files - list uploaded files (200)
Object Storage: GET /api/storage/files - filter by category (200)
Object Storage: GET /api/storage/files/{id}/download - download file (200)
Object Storage: GET /api/storage/files/{id} - get file metadata (200)
PMS-CRM Sync: Creating reservation auto-creates CRM client (200)
PMS-CRM Sync: CRM client updated with total_stays and total_spent
PMS-CRM Sync: created_by field set to 'pms_auto_sync'
Cleanup: Test connections deleted successfully

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not excluded from response after insert_one
HTTPException from file validation caught and re-raised as 500
bugs_fixed.fix: Added except HTTPException: raise before generic Exception handler
Changed to: email = reservation.get('guest_email') or reservation.get('client_email')

seed_data_creation: Created test channel connections (Booking.com, Expedia, Airbnb), uploaded test files (PDF, JPG, PNG), created test reservations for PMS-CRM sync verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel Manager, Object Storage, and PMS-CRM Sync features fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. Channel sync simulates receiving OTA reservations (MOCKED). Rate shopper generates simulated competitor rates (MOCKED). Object Storage uses Emergent Object Storage API (real integration). PMS-CRM sync automatically creates/updates CRM clients when reservations are created.

mocked_apis_list: Channel reservations sync simulates receiving 0-2 reservations per channel
Rate shopper generates simulated competitor rates with random variance

channel_manager.connections: CRUD operations for OTA connections (Booking.com, Expedia, Airbnb, etc.)
channel_manager.connection_test: Simulates API connection test based on credentials presence
channel_manager.inventory: Returns inventory grid with room availability per date/channel
channel_manager.rates: Returns rate grid with pricing per date/room/channel
channel_manager.rate_shopper: Returns competitor rate analysis with recommendations (MOCKED)

object_storage.upload: Uploads files to Emergent Object Storage with metadata
object_storage.file_validation: Validates file types per category (employee_document: pdf, jpg, jpeg, png)
object_storage.list_files: Lists files with filtering by hotel, category, entity
object_storage.metadata: Returns file metadata including size, content_type, storage_path

pms_crm_sync.auto_create: Creates CRM client when reservation is created for new guest
pms_crm_sync.auto_update: Updates CRM client (total_stays, total_spent) for existing guest
